hypothesis: A stricter version of the extension weak-followthrough idea may become usable if it only flags extended entries where all three short-term failure signals appear: entry day red, next close below entry open, and next-day relative strength versus SPY negative.
change_summary: Reused the fixed three-window exp-20260427-022 observed-only audit output and isolated the strict all-three-failure subset. No production strategy code, thresholds, entries, exits, sizing, LLM, or news replay behavior changed.

parameters.extended_entry_definition: signal-day close >=8% above SMA20, or prior 10d return >=12%, or top 5% of 20d range while >=4% above SMA10

market_regime_summary.mid_weak: rotation-heavy bull where strategy makes money but lags indexes
market_regime_summary.old_thin: mixed-to-weak older tape with lower win rate

delta_metrics.gate4_basis: Rejected before production replay because even the strict all-three subset has negative naive net PnL (-$202.84) and would risk known winners in late_strong and mid_weak. A real exit/reduce implementation would also add path dependency and could displace the accepted add-on lifecycle.

llm_metrics.blocker_relation: LLM soft ranking remains sample-limited, so this deterministic lifecycle alpha was tested instead.

rejection_reason: Strict extension weak-followthrough is not a clean exit alpha: it catches real losses but still risks enough large winners to erase the benefit, and the signal is post-entry rather than a clean pre-entry ranking input.
next_retry_requires: Do not retry extension + short-term weak followthrough with nearby threshold tweaks.
A valid retry needs a new orthogonal adverse-information source, such as negative news, earnings deterioration, or forward paper evidence.
Do not promote this into an early exit, reduce, or ranking penalty based only on OHLCV followthrough flags.
notes: Alpha search, not bug repair. The test deliberately avoided LLM soft-ranking because production-aligned replay remains too sparse, and avoided add-on/local scarce-slot threshold families because recent mechanism updates already rejected those nearby paths.
